name: maige-3d-mcp
description: Multi-framework 3D MCP server — Three.js, A-Frame, Babylon.js, R3F with in-world async chat

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,threejs,aframe,babylon,r3f -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "pnpm dev:server" "pnpm dev:threejs" "pnpm dev:aframe" "pnpm dev:babylon" "pnpm dev:r3f"
scripts.build: pnpm build:server && pnpm build:threejs && pnpm build:aframe && pnpm build:babylon && pnpm build:r3f
